name: notation
description: Capture session learnings into the right Claude Code memory tier. /notation:notate routes each learning to global CLAUDE.md, ~/.claude/notes/, per-project MEMORY.md, or project docs - with a lean bias that keeps CLAUDE.md small. Ships a notation-audit skill that flags bloat, stale notes, and orphaned index entries.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC
